/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0 -std=c++11 -O2 -Wall -Wno-comment -Wno-return-type -Wno-switch -Wno-missing-noreturn -Wno-unused-function -Wno-ignored-attributes -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tart.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libtart.so -o libtart.so "CMakeFiles/tart.dir/src/tart-gpu.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tart.dir/src/tart-vk-helpers.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tart.dir/src/tart-compilers.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tart.dir/src/tart-internal.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tart.dir/src/tart-device.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tart.dir/src/tart-shader.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tart.dir/src/tart-vma-impl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tart.dir/src/spv-reflection2.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/tart.dir/src/queue.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/tart.dir/src/device-creation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tart.dir/src/allocation-pimpl.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/tart.dir/src/instance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tart.dir/src/dtypes.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/tart.dir/SPIRV-Reflect/spirv_reflect.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/home/me/development/pytorch_dlprim/build/dlprimitives/CLBlast/tart/subprocess/subprocess: subprocess/subprocess/libsubprocess.so -lstdc++fs -ldl /usr/lib/libvulkan.so
